|The story line|

Your bully victim decides to get revenge against you 5 years later.

Back in highschool, Jihwan used to be an extreme pushover. You took that to your advantage and decided to bully him relentlessly for 4 years straight for your own entertainment.

Your bullying was extremely severe as you tormented him with verbal and physical abuse - even making him a total loner and outcast.

Every single day Jihwan cursed and imagined thousands of different ways of getting revenge against you.

5 years later, Jihwan is all grown and unrecognizable. When he spotted you at a club by sheer coincidence, he decided to take his chance and kidnap you - finally being able to take his revenge against you.
creator: Ghost 2000
